description: Generate user-facing README.md files for plugins: medium, meticulous, microsoft-word, minimax-agent, mongodb-atlas, netflix, netlify, newrelic, notion, npm. Each plugin is built and then the readme command generates the README from dist/tools.json metadata.
qualityChecks: echo 'per-story checks only — each story builds its own plugin'

userStories.title: Generate README for medium plugin
userStories.description: Build the medium plugin and run opentabs-plugin readme to generate a user-facing README.md.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/medium/README.md exists and follows the Phase 6 format
README.md contains a Tools section with grouped tool table
No scaffold boilerplate (Project Structure, Adding Tools, Custom Icons) remains
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/medium/README.md

Context:
The `opentabs-plugin readme` command generates a Phase 6 README from dist/tools.json and package.json.

Steps:
```bash
cd plugins/medium
npm install
npm run build
node ../../platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js readme
```

IMPORTANT: Use `node ../../platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js readme` — NOT `npx opentabs-plugin readme`. The plugin's devDependency is the published version which does not have the readme command yet. The repo-local binary has it.

Constraints:
- Do NOT manually edit the generated README — the command output is the final content
- Do NOT modify any source files — only README.md should change
- If the build fails, debug and fix the build first, then run the readme command
